to arjuna to execute his responsibility or duties as a kshatriya so yes we should engage in our duties
there will be some struggle there will be some this thing with guidance from devotees with

from such discourses we can learn how to execute our duties while maintaining some good healthy

this question is from shabian das prabhuji is this world going to an end
i cannot very strongly say but otherwise what i can very confidently say that this material world is
temporary creation of the world of the lord the spiritual world is eternal this world material
world is
eternal. This world, material world is Bhutva Bhutva Praliyate. It gets created, it stays
for some time and there will be a time when this world will be annihilated. Again the
creation takes place. So that way, yes, world is created at a time, will stay for some time,
will get annihilated when our scriptures give us some understanding of different yugas,
the annihilation, the Mahapralaya that we will probably discuss in some other session.
